# Shields
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Shields&prop=wikitext

Shields are used by the [[Knight]]. By getting up close to the enemy, it can deal a massive amount of damage and apply a '''STUN '''effect, with a few exceptions.

'''GL Shields:'''

Stardust Buckler

[[File:Item Stardust Buckler.png|left|thumb|85x85px]]



'''UT Shields:'''

'''*''' Shield of Vendettas
[[File:Item Shield of Vendettas.png|left|thumb|83x83px]]

This shield drops in the Craig's Castle dungeon.

With 6 shots,  dealing 300-350 damage each, with a 3.2 range, this shield can deal a hefty amount of damage if you're close enough to the enemy.

The shield applies 11 defense on equip, has a 3% fame bonus. The use of the shield costs                                 150 mana.
